creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
OpenSSL 3.0.0 has reached RELEASE status on 2021-09-07.

Requesting an exp-run on the full ports tree to test all ports for building against OpenSSL 3.0.0. We need to scope the fallout prior to switching security/openssl to OpenSSL 3.

> DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= openssl-devel

should show all fall-out on ports-tree.

NOTE: Not only build-errors exist, apache24 builds with OpenSSL 3.0.0 yet fails at runtime.
